nasb.text: When they had appointed elders for them in every church, having prayed with fasting, they commended them to the Lord in whom they had believed.

esv.text: And when they had appointed elders for them in every church, with prayer and fasting they committed them to the Lord in whom they had believed.

cnv.text: 兩人在各教會為他們指派了長老；禁食祈禱之後，就把他們交託給所信的主。

ccb.text: 二人又为每个教会选立长老，禁食祷告，把他们交托给所信靠的主。

csbs.text: 保罗和巴拿巴在各教会为他们选出了长老，祷告和禁食以后，把他们交托给他们所信靠的主。
